channel.title: Ming News
channel.description: Independent English news analysis and public-interest briefings.

item.title: How Newsrooms Use AI Without Giving Up Editorial Control
item.description: Editors are building practical safeguards around automation so reporting can move faster without outsourcing judgment.

item.title: Why Cities Are Rebuilding Public Data Portals
item.description: Open data projects are shifting from static downloads to reader-friendly civic tools.
